reviews.comment:
Pésima limpieza. Falta total de higiene, en la habitación. Sabanas, toallas y acolchados, manchados, raídos y percudidos. Se nota la falta de reposición durante años. Vidrios muy sucios. Espejo baño con salpicaduras y mampara sucia. Alfombra sucia y con insectos muertos. Pelos en pileta y bañera.
Lo peor es que nadie resolvió nada ante la queja.
Las pastas (ñoquis y tallarines de la cena) nadaban en agua. Sin colar.
Se nota la decadencia y falta de supervisión del ACA.
Lamentable. Tuve mejores experiencias años atrás .

(Translated by Google)
Terrible cleanliness. Complete lack of hygiene in the room. Sheets, towels, and comforters were stained, worn, and dingy. It's clear they haven't been replaced for years. Very dirty windows. Bathroom mirror with splashes and a dirty shower screen. Dirty carpet with dead insects. Hair in the sink and bathtub.
The worst part is that no one did anything about the complaint. The pasta (gnocchi and tagliatelle at dinner) was swimming in water. Undrained. The decline and lack of supervision by the ACA is evident. Dismal. I've had better experiences years ago.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtajdLLXhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención la del playero que nos atendió.. tiene hotel(para miembros del acá es más barato) no paramos a dormir pero vi que la habitación doble estaba cerca de 6000$(febrero 2022) , el shop no tiene muchas cosas para comprar, lo justo y necesario tienen.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant who served us was very helpful. They have a hotel (cheaper for members). We didn't stay overnight, but I saw that a double room was around $6000 (February 2022). The shop doesn't have many things to buy; they have just the essentials.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcGEtcTRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen hotel para pasar la noche y seguir camino, el restaurante normal, la comida bien, me parece un poco caro para lo que es un restaurante en la ruta, 1 gaseosa chica, 2 latas de Heineken, 2 raviol con bolognesa y 1 queso y dulce $ 3980, casi 2mil.  persona es un poco elevado

(Translated by Google)
A good hotel for spending the night before continuing on your journey. The restaurant is average, the food is okay, but I think it's a bit expensive for a roadside restaurant: 1 small soda, 2 cans of Heineken, 2 ravioli with Bolognese sauce, and 1 cheese and quince paste dish came to $3980, almost $2,000 per person is a bit pricey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtb2RfM2xBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para cargar combustible, muy atentos los playeros, pero si quieren comer bien conviene ir al carrito Edu que está enfrente, justo al lado de la revisación técnica

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to refuel, the beach attendants are very attentive, but if you want to eat well, it's best to go to the Edu cart which is across the street, right next to the technical inspection.
